gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Render a closed Core IR [`Node`] as the `LlmCanonical` s-expression surface (RFC-0021 §4.6)."] # [doc = " **Total** over every node kind (enforced by the exhaustive `match`) and **deterministic** (a pure"] # [doc = " function of the node). Preserves the honesty overlay (P2/P3)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " **RFC-0041 §4.7 W1 (RR-29 guard-hole census):** `Node` is a post-elaboration tree that can exceed"] # [doc = " the L1 parser's 256-frame depth (an editor buffer is untrusted input), and `render_node` recurses"] # [doc = " one stack frame per nesting level.
